summary: Portfolio/business website built on Internet Computer (Motoko backend) with an admin panel for managing founder info, projects, services, and contact submissions. User wants the admin panel accessible directly within the web app.
architectural_notes: Backend runs on Internet Computer using Motoko with built-in persistent storage — no external databases supported
Admin panel login credentials: username 'admin', password 'Nikhil@123'

existing_features.title: Add a React-based admin panel accessible at the '/admin' route within the existing single-page app. The panel must include a login screen (username: admin, password: Nikhil@123) that gates access to the dashboard. The dashboard must have sections for: (1) editing founder info including photo URL upload, (2) managing portfolio projects (add/edit/delete), (3) managing services (add/edit/delete), and (4) viewing contact form submissions. All changes must call the backend actor methods and reflect immediately on the public-facing site.

Update the public-facing TeamSection, PortfolioSection, ServicesSection, and CTASection components to fetch their content from the backend actor instead of using hardcoded static data, so that admin panel changes are reflected live on the website.

new_feature_requests.summary: Integrated admin panel accessible directly in the web app for managing founder photo, projects, services, and contact submissions

Create a backend actor with persistent storage for all manageable site content: founder info (name, title, bio, photo URL), portfolio projects (title, description, category, image, results), services (title, description, icon), and contact form submissions (name, email, message, timestamp). Expose update and query functions for each entity, and a simple admin authentication check using a hardcoded password ('Nikhil@123').
